_comment: v2.8.0 Action #3 fixture spec - declarative description of the zip we build at test time. Committing the zip bytes directly is avoided so reviewers can see the test data in plain text. The companion fixture-builder helper in tests/test_v280_data_act_scraper.py constructs the zip in memory from this spec on every run.

members.README.txt: non-json member that parse_zip must ignore
